summary: Expected live site, got 404 error. Previous promise failed.
detailed_context: The AI confidently stated the secrets were done and the CI pipeline was fully wired, then asked the user to verify the site was live. The user checked saralogy.com and found a deployment failure (404). The terse error dump response signals clear dissatisfaction—the promised working deployment didn't materialize. This is a significant miss: the AI overpromised and the core objective (live site) failed.
